channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 0 com severidade Crítica
• 4 com severidade Alta
• 3 novas CVEs
• 1 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

Sem notícias para seção de Infraestrutura.

────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 CISA Adds Actively Exploited Linux Root Access Bug CVE-2026-31431 to KEV
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 7.8
Resumo:
Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) on Friday added a recently disclosed security flaw impacting various Linux distributions to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog, citing evidence of active exploitation in the wild. The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-31431 (CVSS score: 7.8), is a case of local privilege escalation (LPE) flaw that could allow an
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/cisa-adds-actively-exploited-linux-root.html
 
🚨 CVE-2026-31727 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: usb: gadget: u_ether: Fix NULL pointer deref in eth_get_drvinfo Commit ec35c1969650 ("usb: gadget: f_ncm: Fix net_device lifecycle with device_move") reparents the gadget device to /sys/devices/virtual during unbind, clearing the gadget pointer. If the userspace tool queries on the surviving interface during this detached window, this leads to a NULL...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-31727
 
💣 Critrical cPanel flaw mass-exploited in "Sorry" ransomware attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo SentinelOne. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/critrical-cpanel-flaw-mass-exploited-in-sorry-ransomware-attacks/
 
📰 Handling the Vulnerability Surge in the Post-Mythos Era - Qualys
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia está relacionada a Qualys no contexto de segurança da informação, com potencial relevância para monitoramento, prevenção ou resposta.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMipgFBVV95cUxQbWdsLVA0ZHdwbVc2WVp6aHg0WC1DUTQzX0trb25aejEzR2NCcEx5VDZoNVdBcjkzdkxDT0laTU9PYzlEWEVTd0lLa0xuMWtQOF9INW5zcFoxTFZTdURKYlJpRnN2VDJJNFVNY2hYNnNzRTNTWm55WjVoczViZlJ2U1F5eXlOVkhEZGJNX3Y4UHBSSnBoOFdmNjBrdkFqa0d3Yk42NzB3?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 CVE-2026-6378 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.4
Resumo:
The Maxi Blocks plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the `/wp-json/maxi-blocks/v1.0/style-card` REST API endpoint in all versions up to, and including, 2.1.9 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping of the `sc_styles` parameter. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Author-level access and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts that execute on ever...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-6378
 
📰 Ubuntu and Canonical services disrupted by DDoS attack claimed by hacktivists | brief | SC Media - SC Media
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Ubuntu, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqwFBVV95cUxQTjNBOXhkM05qNHhsVFBHMF9iWlN6QWROZThGSll3cUs4RUlzZi15d05kUHZiXzhzVjlYYXBLMzVSa0dURXFFRFRXMzhkaWhaWEt2M2NOQTFRWk5KaWFXdTlUdi1XYVBvVkRpQ3ZtY1ZOSEtxY0tDSXBXVmRMbll3aUdZMkhJcTl1Q3dOM1U5UWJJYmpXVlc3cmZlY1dhNzhWYndmZW1pOUVBbm8?oc=5
 
📰 Westports Earthplace Teams With Silvermine Arts Center On Exhibitions - Patch
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia aborda atualização ou correção de segurança associada a Office, o que pode exigir validação e aplicação no ambiente.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMivgFBVV95cUxPb0wwNFVZVUxCRUtYdi1Pb1ZJUzJFLWJOUmdRSWpFS1ktVy1fZUVvUEhnMXhyQmRSWWl6c0JWbVkzQjVmT3B5RmxMRk9lNnN2bnRheHZjb2dYV1dhbDg0OF8zdERVdThuUGVzTDhsNlRnZHlvQTZBQUdTaVh6eUdrWE5keUQtSXpBMy1obFZubmRjRjlwVUFsZlM5VDVjNkd2OWNfWjdNdUx5MFRnLVBXUHdxQVFROFNxcF82MGJB0gG-AUFVX3lxTE9vTDA0VVlVTEJFS1h2LU9vVklTMkUtYk5SZ1FJakVLWS1XLV9lRW9QSGcxeHJCZFJZaXpzQlZtWTNCNWZPcHlGbExGT2U2c3ZudGF4dmNvZ1hXV2FsODQ4XzN0RFV1OG5QZXNMOGw2VGdkeW9BNkFBR1NpWHp5R2tYTmR5RC1JekEzLWhsVm5uZGNGOXBVQWxmUzlUNWM2R3Y5Y19aN011THkwVGctUFdQd3FBUVE4U3FwXzYwYkE?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias do período de 01/05/2026 até 03/05/2026.
